sources.attribution: New York State Department of Transportation
sources.notes: 511NY REST API v2. Requires free dev key via ?key= param. Endpoints: /api/v2/get/alerts, events, cameras, message signs, winter road conditions. Original /api/getalerts endpoint deprecated.

sources.attribution: New York State Department of Transportation
sources.notes: Public WZDx GeoJSON feed at /api/wzdx. No API key needed. Work zone data with road_event_id, road_names, direction, mileposts, geometry, lanes, restrictions, start/end dates.

sources.attribution: New York State Department of Environmental Conservation
sources.notes: Open NY SODA API — Forest Ranger Wildland Fire Reporting DB (2008–present). Fields: fire_number, incident_name, start_date, county, cause, acreage, lat/long, fatalities. Also 1975-2007 at data.ny.gov/resource/4xir-miej.json. No real-time fire danger map REST found on DEC ArcGIS server.

NYISO real-time fuel mix CSV from mis.nyiso.com. Format: /public/csv/rtfuelmix/{YYYYMMDD}rtfuelmix.csv. Also LBMP, load, gen maintenance at mis.nyiso.com/public/. The oasis-postings.prod.nysdi.com endpoint was returning 404.

sources.attribution: NOAA CO-OPS / Great Lakes Environmental Research Laboratory
sources.notes: NOAA CO-OPS API for Great Lakes water levels. Station 9075035 = Essexville MI (Lake Huron / Lake Erie corridor). Also USACE combined lakes CSV at lre-wm.usace.army.mil/ForecastData/WaterLevelData/GLHYD_data_metric.csv.

sources.attribution: New York State Department of Environmental Conservation
sources.notes: NYSDEC ArcGIS Online FeatureServer for HAB reports (131 current). Fields: water_name, county, HAB_STATUS (Confirmed/Suspected), extent_bloom (Small Localized/Widespread), date_time, Weblink. Also archived reports at /Archived_HAB_Reports_DIL/FeatureServer (223 records). Supports f=geojson.

USGS FDSN Event API. Params: format=geojson&minmagnitude=2.5&maxlatitude=45&minlatitude=40.5&maxlongitude=-71.8&minlongitude=-80. Returns GeoJSON with magnitude, place, time, depth, coordinates, url, alert, tsunami, felt, cdi, mmi. No key required.

NWS API marine products. Great Lakes Marine Forecast — Lake Erie and Lake Ontario. Product codes: CWF (Coastal Waters), GLF (Great Lakes), MWW (Marine Weather), SRF (Surf), CFW (Coastal Flood). Use /types/{code} to list active products, /types/{code}/locations/{loc} for GeoJSON. No key required.
NWS API active alerts for NY. Winter storms, severe storms, flood, lake effect snow. GeoJSON.

sources.authority: USGS New York Water Science Center
sources.notes: USGS instantaneous values for NY. Streamflow, gage height, temperature.
